title: Absolute Aromas | Natural Lavender Room Spray with Pure Lavender Essential Oil - A Light, Crisp and Calming Aroma - 100% Pure, Natural, Vegan, Undiluted and Cruelty-Free, 100ml
features: 100% PURE - Natural, vegan, GMO-free, cruelty-free, sustainably sourced & ozone layer friendly room spray
AROMATHERAPY – This room spray is made using our pure Lavender oil. Lavender is a versatile, gentle oil that has a light, earthy aroma.
USAGE TIP – Spritz a few times in your workplace or home for a soothing, refreshing and mood-boosting atmosphere.

FRESHNESS IN A BOTTLE - Lavender is part of our Room Spray range. A range of some of our most popular essential oils and oil blends bottled into a handy room spray to help fragrance your surroundings in a fresh and natural way.
AUTHENTIC - Members of the Aromatherapy Trade Council - Ethically sourced, authentic and quality assured aromatherapy oils for 30 years.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Create Calm 2 Sleep 3 Tranquil Mornings 4 100% Natural Our Lavender Range Lavender Room Spray Add To Basket Lavender Bath Salts 290g Add To Basket Lavender Epsom Bath Salts Add To Basket French Lavender EO 10ml Add To Basket Lavender Aroma-Roll Buying Options Lavender Face Cream Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 855 4.4 out of 5 stars 2,988 4.4 out of 5 stars 62 4.5 out of 5 stars 657 4.2 out of 5 stars 843 — Price £9.57 £ 9 . 57 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £4.50 £ 4 . 50 £7.97 £ 7 . 97 — £19.99 £ 19 . 99 100% Pure Lavender ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Vegan ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Lab Tested ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Ethically Sourced ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Paraben free ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Made in England ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What makes this Lavender Natural Room Spray unique? Unlike synthetic air fresheners, this spray is made from pure Lavender essential oil and contains no artificial perfumes, parabens, or aerosols — offering a truly natural way to enhance your wellbeing. Is the Lavender Natural Room Spray 100% pure? Yes, all ingredients used in our Lavender Natural Room Spray are 100% pure and natural. We only use the finest Bulgarian Lavender sourced sustainably for farms we have worked with for decades. How do I use it for the best results? Spray 2–3 times into the air and allow the soothing aroma to fill the room naturally. Its floral, herbaceous notes will gently promote calm and clarity without overpowering. Is it safe around pets? Yes, but we recommend using this in well-ventilated areas. Do not directly spray on pets.
